creator: dmytro@posteo.net
text:
Created attachment 199610
Patch with update to be implemented from the ports root directory

Please, check & commit my patch with www/payara update.

Main change: The new version implements Java EE 8 specifications set (current version in the ports tree implements Java EE 7).

Full changelog(s): https://docs.payara.fish/release-notes/release-notes-183.html
